sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 17.54 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.17)

statement.latex: Does there exist a non-hereditary local formation${ F}$of finite groups such that in every finite group the set of all${ F}$-subnormal subgroups is a sublattice of the subgroup lattice? % A negative answer would solve 9.75, since all the hereditary local formations with the same property are already known. { S.\,F.\,Kamornikov}

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory IV_PROBLEM_UNDEFINED; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
